audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + cần + N]]. Use cần before a thing to say that it is needed.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + cần + N]]: Cần functions as a necessity predicate taking a nominal complement in this controlled frame.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + cần + N

Use cần before a thing to say that it is needed. Example: [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần một túi.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + cần + N

Cần functions as a necessity predicate taking a nominal complement in this controlled frame. Literal example: [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần một túi.]]

audienceSections.normal: Cần can introduce a needed object directly. This chapter does not yet teach need followed by a full verb phrase.
audienceSections.expert: Cần can introduce a needed object directly. This chapter does not yet teach need followed by a full verb phrase. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh chuẩn bị cho ngày mai.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh prepares for tomorrow.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần một túi.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh needs a bag.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần giấy.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh needs paper.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần hộ chiếu.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh needs a passport.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần vé.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh needs a ticket.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh cần sạc.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh needs a charger.
- [[grammar:Trần Thu Hà có vé.]] — Trần Thu Hà has the ticket.
- [[grammar:Ngày mai, Nguyễn Minh Anh đi.]] — Tomorrow, Nguyễn Minh Anh goes.
